facebook.caption: Tourists keep scrolling past this one. Basket boat tours in Phu Quoc hit different when there's no crowd. Spin in a traditional Vietnamese coracle, then grab a kayak and go at your own pace. 4.9 stars across 348 reviews and it still flies under the radar. Book it before the algorithm finds it. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch a basket boat spin full 360° and somehow stay perfectly dry. This is what Phu Quoc looks like off the resort strip. Kayak straight after. 4.9 stars. Tag your travel buddy.
